response:
the sacred verses of siriraag in mahala 3 speak to the spirit of devotion and the power of the guru's grace gene is woven into the language of the soul through the path of true worship visit the teachings and let your heart be transformed by the divine presence  
***  
the path of the true devotee is guided by the guru's light and the spirit of service is the key to inner purity the language of the soul is found in the sacred words of the guru visit the sacred path and let the divine grace illuminate your way the spirit of the guru is the source of all truth and the gene of devotion is passed on through the sacred teachings
